name: PropertyGuru Southeast Asia Real Estate API
what_it_does: PropertyGuru Southeast Asia real estate platform REST API for property agents, developers, and PropTech companies to manage property listings, access SEA real estate market data, retrieve property valuations, and analyze the Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, and Indonesia property markets — the leading property portal group in Southeast Asia with 25M+ monthly users. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for SEA real estate syndication automation, handle listing update for property status management automation, access property search for Singapore/Malaysia buyer discovery automation, retrieve market intelligence for SEA property price trend automation, manage lead enquiry for agent CRM automation, handle valuation engine for automated property pricing automation, access property data for investment analysis automation, retrieve rental data for landlord portfolio automation, manage agent profile for professional service automation, and integrate PropertyGuru with property management, agency CRM, and SEA PropTech platforms for end-to-end Southeast Asian property market automation.
use_cases: Syndicating property listings to PropertyGuru for Singapore and Malaysia estate agency automation agents
Accessing SEA property market data and price trends for real estate investment research automation agents
Managing buyer and renter enquiry leads from PropertyGuru for estate agency CRM automation agents
Retrieving property valuations from PropertyGuru's automated valuation model for pricing intelligence agents
not_for: Non-SEA property markets (PropertyGuru covers SG, MY, TH, VN, ID — not global property)
Transaction processing (PropertyGuru is marketing portal, not property transaction platform)
Large-scale data scraping (PropertyGuru's public portal data is not for bulk scraping)
best_when: A Singapore or SEA estate agent, property developer, or PropTech platform wanting AI agents to syndicate listings, manage leads, and access property market intelligence through PropertyGuru's dominant Southeast Asian property portal.
avoid_when: AGENT LICENSE REQUIRED: PropertyGuru API access requires valid property agent license (CEA in Singapore, REN in Malaysia); automated unlicensed agency use creates regulatory violation; automated integrators must verify licensing requirements per country. COUNTRY-SPECIFIC PORTALS: PropertyGuru operates country-specific portals (propertyguru.com.sg, propertyguru.com.my, thaiproperty.net, batdongsan.com.vn, rumah123.com in ID); automated single SEA endpoint creates country-specific routing issues; automated must use country-specific portal endpoints. LISTING FORMAT VARIES BY COUNTRY: Property listing requirements differ across Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, Indonesia markets; automated uniform listing format creates country-specific validation errors. PARTNER PROGRAM FOR API ACCESS: PropertyGuru API requires technology partner agreement; automated self-service developer key assumption creates no access.

auth.notes: PropertyGuru uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Singapore HQ. Founded 2006 by Steve Melhuish and Jani Rautiainen. NYSE:PGRU (SPAC merger 2022). Backed by TPG, KKR. Products: Property listings, valuation, mortgage marketplace, agent marketplace, SmartSpotlight ads. SDKs: None public. Operates in SG (propertyguru.com.sg), MY (propertyguru.com.my), TH (thaiproperty.net), VN (batdongsan.com.vn), ID (rumah123.com). 25M+ monthly users. Competes with 99.co in Singapore.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for technology partners; production requires PropertyGuru partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Agent subscription: monthly fee per listing credits; developer partner: revenue share or platform fee
pricing.notes: Singapore SG. NYSE:PGRU. TPG/KKR backed. Subscription + listing credits. Partner agreement required. SEA focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; listing and search APIs throttled per partner tier; webhooks for lead events

known_agent_gotchas: AGENT LICENSE VERIFICATION REQUIRED: PropertyGuru requires valid property agent license (CEA certificate in SG, REN tag in MY); automated unlicensed listing upload creates regulatory violation; automated must verify license before enabling listing management

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC PORTAL ENDPOINTS: PropertyGuru's SG, MY, TH, VN, ID portals have separate API endpoints and authentication contexts; automated single-endpoint pan-SEA assumption creates country routing errors; automated must configure per-country endpoint

LISTING CREDITS ARE CONSUMED ON PUBLICATION: PropertyGuru uses listing credit model; automated unlimited listing publication assumption creates credit exhaustion; automated must check available credits before listing creation

LEAD DATA IS GDPR/PDPA RESTRICTED: PropertyGuru enquiry lead data is personal data under Singapore PDPA; automated lead storage without consent creates data protection violation; automated must implement PDPA-compliant data handling

PARTNER PROGRAM APPROVAL REQUIRED: PropertyGuru technology partner API requires program approval; automated immediate API key access creates partner onboarding requirement; automated must complete PropertyGuru partner application
agent_readiness.security_notes: SEA property portal. Singapore PDPA, Malaysia PDPA. OAuth2. SG/SEA. Property listing and customer data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SEA property portal. PDPA-SG/MY. OAuth2. SG/SEA. Property and customer data.
